M1030 (M0250) Therapies in Home- None Above This field is checked if the patient receives none of the above therapies at home. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1030_THH_PAR_NUTR M1030 (M0250) Therapies in Home- Parenteral Nutrition This field is checked if the patient receives parenteral nutrition (TPN or lipids) at home. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1032_HOSP_RISK_RCNT_DCLN M1032 Risk for Hosp- Decline in Mental, Emotional, Behavioral This
